subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! At this moment I confess and acknowledge my powerlessness to recognize Thy most exalted Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا الحین اقر و اعترف بعجزی عن عرفان نفسک العلیا فی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for protection, @presence of; reunion with God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
